ip_outcome_note: No suspected_ip flagged. Generic FFXIV job class card — no named character identity.

trivia_bullets.text: Machinist (8-073C) is an Earth-element Backup from Opus VIII, Category: FFXIV. Introduced in FFXIV Heavensward (3.0, June 2015) as a Ranged Physical DPS role, the Machinist is Ishgard's gun-and-turret combat discipline — developed by the Skysteel Manufactory in response to the Dragonsong War. [Square Enix FFXIV official job guide; FFXIV consolegameswiki]

The Machinist's lore involves fusing Ishgardian craftsmanship with Garlean imperial magitek via Cid Garlond's Garlond Ironworks. The aetherotransformer device converts the wearer's aether into lightning-aspected energy for firearms and turrets. The FFXIV player character is canonically one of the discipline's first practitioners. [FFXIV official job guide; Square Enix forum lore thread]

Machinist appears as a recurring Earth-element Common Backup across Opus II (2-083C), Opus VI (6-069C), and Opus VIII (8-073C). Its consistent reprint pattern mirrors the Dark Knight's, cementing both Heavensward-launch jobs as parallel Common fixtures in FFTCG Earth builds. [Final Fantasy Card Game Wikia: FFXIV category]
